CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Sent to Visit Unit (Open House), O" and send "Ownership, Send to Visit via Open House" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Sent to Visit Unit (Open House), O" and send "Ownership, Send to Visit via Open House" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.label: Send Open House Emails, O
